accurate.why: What the summary states is accurate: the designation and cooperative agreement authority with public/private entities and NYC for interpretive/educational purposes are correctly described.

exceptions_conditions.why: Omits multiple material limitations: the site is NOT a unit of the National Park System; the Secretary cannot acquire land through condemnation; the Secretary cannot interfere with private property rights, local zoning, or NYC/NY administration; and cooperative agreements require the written consent of the property owner. These are significant conditions.

effective_dates.why: No internal effective date beyond enactment specified.

major_provisions_covered.why: The designation and cooperative agreement authority are the core operative provisions and are covered. The omitted limitations are secondary to the primary designation.

correct_entities.why: Secretary of Interior, NYC Mayor, Harlem correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: No dollar amounts or quantities to verify.
